includeNews.description: Whether to include recent news in the stock analysis.

name.description: Optional company display name used to disambiguate the symbol.

analysisAt.description: Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

exDividendDate.description: Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

analysisAt.description: Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

evalWindowDays.description: Evaluation window in days for simulated backtest outcomes.

name.description: Optional company display name used to disambiguate the symbol.

pctAbove20d.description:
Optional so a missing/failed Barchart reading serializes as JSON null
 instead of collapsing to 0, which would render identically to a real 0%
 reading (severe market dislocation with no S&P stocks above SMA).

CommodityQuote.description: CommodityQuote represents a commodity price quote from Yahoo Finance.

CryptoQuote.description: CryptoQuote represents a cryptocurrency quote from CoinGecko.

CryptoSector.description: CryptoSector represents performance data for a crypto market sector.

change.description: Average 24h percentage change across sector tokens.

Error.description: Error is returned when a handler encounters an error. It contains a simple error message that the developer can customize.

message.description: Error message (e.g., 'user not found', 'database connection failed')

EtfFlow.description: EtfFlow represents a single ETF with estimated flow data.

avgVolume.description: Average volume over prior days.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

estFlow.description: Estimated dollar flow magnitude.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

volume.description: Latest daily volume.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

EtfFlowsSummary.description: EtfFlowsSummary contains aggregate ETF flow stats.

totalEstFlow.description: Total estimated flow across all ETFs.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

totalVolume.description: Total volume across all ETFs.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

description.description: Human-readable description of the validation violation (e.g., 'must be a valid email address', 'required field missing')

field.description: The field path that failed validation (e.g., 'user.email' for nested fields). For header validation, this will be the header name (e.g., 'X-API-Key')

GetCountryStockIndexRequest.description: GetCountryStockIndexRequest specifies which country's stock index to retrieve.

GetCountryStockIndexResponse.description: GetCountryStockIndexResponse contains the country's primary stock index data.

available.description: Whether stock index data is available for this country.

fsiLabel.description:
Label for fsi_value: Low Stress (>=1.5), Moderate Stress (>=0.8),
 Elevated Stress (>=0.3), otherwise High Stress.

fsiValue.description:
Bespoke Fear & Greed header stress ratio, not the KCFSI/ECB FSI panel
 composite. Formula: (HYG / TLT) / (VIX * HY OAS / 100).

hygPrice.description: Latest HYG ETF price used in the Fear & Greed header stress ratio.

tltPrice.description: Latest TLT ETF price used in the Fear & Greed header stress ratio.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol for insider transaction lookup.

GetSectorSummaryRequest.description: GetSectorSummaryRequest specifies parameters for retrieving sector performance.

period.description:
Time period for performance calculation (e.g., "1d", "1w", "1m"). Defaults to "1d".
 Accepted but currently ignored; no-op until this handler supports the parameter.

includeNews.description: Whether history snapshots should include stored news summaries.

limitPerSymbol.description: Maximum number of history snapshots to return per symbol.

items.description: Stock ticker symbols whose stored analysis history should be returned.

GulfQuote.description: GulfQuote represents a Gulf region market quote (index, currency, or oil).

funding.description: Raw metrics (nullable as strings to preserve precision; "" = unavailable)

items.description: Sparkline arrays (most recent last); up to 60 samples (5h @ 5min)

shares.description: Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

ListAiTokensRequest.description: ListAiTokensRequest retrieves AI crypto token prices.

ListAiTokensResponse.description: ListAiTokensResponse contains AI token price data.

ListCommodityQuotesRequest.description: ListCommodityQuotesRequest specifies which commodities to retrieve.

items.description: Commodity symbols to retrieve (Yahoo symbols). Empty returns defaults.

ListCryptoQuotesRequest.description: ListCryptoQuotesRequest specifies which cryptocurrencies to retrieve.

items.description: Cryptocurrency IDs to retrieve (CoinGecko IDs). Empty returns defaults.

ListCryptoSectorsResponse.description: ListCryptoSectorsResponse contains crypto sector performance data.

ListDefiTokensResponse.description: ListDefiTokensResponse contains DeFi token price data.

fromDate.description: Accepted but currently ignored; no-op until this handler supports the parameter.

toDate.description: Accepted but currently ignored; no-op until this handler supports the parameter.

ListEtfFlowsRequest.description: ListEtfFlowsRequest is empty; the handler uses a fixed list of BTC spot ETFs.

ListEtfFlowsResponse.description: ListEtfFlowsResponse contains BTC spot ETF flow data.

rateLimited.description: True when the upstream API rate-limited the request.

ListMarketQuotesRequest.description: ListMarketQuotesRequest specifies which stock/index symbols to retrieve.

items.description: Ticker symbols to retrieve (e.g., ["AAPL", "^GSPC"]). Empty returns defaults.

ListMarketQuotesResponse.description: ListMarketQuotesResponse contains stock and index quotes.

finnhubSkipped.description: True when the Finnhub API key is not configured and stock quotes were skipped.

rateLimited.description: True when the upstream API rate-limited the request.

skipReason.description: Human-readable reason when Finnhub was skipped (e.g., "FINNHUB_API_KEY not configured").

ListOtherTokensRequest.description: ListOtherTokensRequest retrieves other/trending crypto token prices.

ListOtherTokensResponse.description: ListOtherTokensResponse contains other token price data.

ListStablecoinMarketsRequest.description: ListStablecoinMarketsRequest specifies which stablecoins to retrieve.

items.description: CoinGecko IDs to retrieve (e.g. "tether,usd-coin"). Empty returns defaults.

evalWindowDays.description: Evaluation window in days used by stored backtests.

items.description: Stock ticker symbols whose stored backtests should be returned.

MarketQuote.description: MarketQuote represents a stock or index quote from Finnhub or Yahoo Finance.

SectorPerformance.description: SectorPerformance represents performance data for a market sector.

change.description: Percentage change over the measured period.

Stablecoin.description: Stablecoin represents a single stablecoin with peg health data.

deviation.description: Deviation from $1.00 peg, as a percentage.

StablecoinSummary.description: StablecoinSummary contains aggregate stablecoin market stats.

depeggedCount.description: Number of stablecoins in DEPEGGED state.

totalMarketCap.description: Total market cap across all queried stablecoins.

totalVolume24h.description: Total 24h volume across all queried stablecoins.

publishedAt.description: Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

UnauthorizedError.description: Returned when the API key is missing, malformed, or lacks current API access.

epochGradeDate.description: Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

ValidationError.description: ValidationError is returned when request validation fails. It contains a list of field violations describing what went wrong.

ApiKeyHeader.description: Alias header for the WorldMonitor API key (X-WorldMonitor-Key).
ApiKeyHeader.name: X-Api-Key

BearerAuth.description: Bearer token: a Clerk-issued JWT for browser session flows, passed as Authorization: Bearer <token>.

get.description: AnalyzeStock retrieves a premium stock analysis report with technicals, news, and AI synthesis.

parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol to analyze.
parameters.name: symbol

parameters.description: Optional company display name used to disambiguate the symbol.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Whether to include recent news in the stock analysis.
parameters.name: include_news

get.description: BacktestStock replays premium stock-analysis signals over recent price history.

parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol to backtest.
parameters.name: symbol

parameters.description: Optional company display name used to disambiguate the symbol.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Evaluation window in days for simulated backtest outcomes.
parameters.name: eval_window_days

get.description: GetCotPositioning retrieves CFTC COT institutional positioning data.
GetCountryStockIndex retrieves the primary stock index for a country from Yahoo Finance.

parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., "US", "GB", "JP").
parameters.name: country_code

get.description: GetFearGreedIndex retrieves the composite Fear & Greed sentiment index.
GetGoldIntelligence retrieves gold pricing, cross-currency XAU, ratios, and CFTC positioning.
GetHyperliquidFlow retrieves Hyperliquid perp positioning flow (funding/OI/basis composite scores).
GetInsiderTransactions retrieves SEC insider buy/sell activity from Finnhub.

parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol for insider transaction lookup.
parameters.name: symbol

get.description: GetMarketBreadthHistory retrieves historical % of S&P 500 stocks above 20/50/200-day SMAs.
GetSectorSummary retrieves market sector performance data from Finnhub.

parameters.description:
Time period for performance calculation (e.g., "1d", "1w", "1m"). Defaults to "1d".
 Accepted but currently ignored; no-op until this handler supports the parameter.
parameters.name: period

get.description: GetStockAnalysisHistory retrieves shared premium stock analysis history from the backend store.

parameters.description: Stock ticker symbols whose stored analysis history should be returned.
parameters.name: symbols

parameters.description: Maximum number of history snapshots to return per symbol.
parameters.name: limit_per_symbol

parameters.description: Whether history snapshots should include stored news summaries.
parameters.name: include_news

get.description: ListAiTokens retrieves AI-focused crypto token prices and changes.
ListCommodityQuotes retrieves commodity price quotes from Yahoo Finance.

parameters.description: Commodity symbols to retrieve (Yahoo symbols). Empty returns defaults.
parameters.name: symbols

get.description: ListCryptoQuotes retrieves cryptocurrency quotes from CoinGecko.

parameters.description: Cryptocurrency IDs to retrieve (CoinGecko IDs). Empty returns defaults.
parameters.name: ids

get.description: ListCryptoSectors retrieves crypto sector performance averages.
ListDefiTokens retrieves DeFi token prices and changes.
ListEarningsCalendar retrieves upcoming and recent earnings releases.

parameters.description: Accepted but currently ignored; no-op until this handler supports the parameter.
parameters.name: fromDate

parameters.description: Accepted but currently ignored; no-op until this handler supports the parameter.
parameters.name: toDate

get.description: ListEtfFlows retrieves BTC spot ETF flow estimates from Yahoo Finance.
ListGulfQuotes retrieves Gulf region market quotes (indices, currencies, oil).
ListMarketQuotes retrieves stock and index quotes.

parameters.description: Ticker symbols to retrieve (e.g., ["AAPL", "^GSPC"]). Empty returns defaults.
parameters.name: symbols

get.description: ListOtherTokens retrieves other/trending crypto token prices and changes.
ListStablecoinMarkets retrieves stablecoin peg health and market data from CoinGecko.

parameters.description: CoinGecko IDs to retrieve (e.g. "tether,usd-coin"). Empty returns defaults.
parameters.name: coins

get.description: ListStoredStockBacktests retrieves stored premium backtest snapshots from the backend store.

parameters.description: Stock ticker symbols whose stored backtests should be returned.
parameters.name: symbols

parameters.description: Evaluation window in days used by stored backtests.
parameters.name: eval_window_days
